title: EventEnvelope

eventId.description: Stable URN uniquely identifying this event (urn:srcos:event:<id>).

eventType.description: String discriminator identifying the type of event (e.g., 'RunRecorded', 'PolicyUpdated').

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

occurredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred.

actor.description: Subject and optional network context of the actor that caused the event.

objectId.description: URN of the platform object this event pertains to.

payload.description: Event-specific payload; structure is determined by eventType.

integrity.description: Optional event hash and signature for tamper-evident delivery.

description: A generic wrapper for all events published to the SourceOS event spine, providing a uniform structure for event identity, actor, timing, target object, and typed payload.
